sharedLibraries.note: These must appear under <projects> in the generated application's .project file, exactly as in the reference template.

logging.requirement: Use the shared logging/tracking framework (ED6_MessageLoggingTracking_Shared / ED6_BatchFramework_Shared) for all INFO/ERROR logging. Do not invent bespoke logging code or write directly to stdout/user trace.
Preserve existing framework call sites when copying a template; only add logging that follows the same convention already present in the reference ESQL.

errorHandling.requirement: Reuse the batch framework's error/exception handling. Do not swallow exceptions; let them propagate to the framework's handler as the templates do.

enforcement.check: Generated .project lists all three ED6_*_Shared projects.
No custom logging framework is introduced.
